'''Kama Elias''' was a participant of the [[Katharsis]], the game founded by the failed [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Xanatos]] and the Telosian treasurer [[Vox Chun]]. Eventually, [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] discovered that it was a fraud.

{{Char-stub}}
